caps.proposition_text: The clinician assesses a musculoskeletal low back strain.

evidence.span_text: - Medical Reasoning: I believe he has a musculoskeletal low back strain. I do not expect to see anything significant on x-ray, but we will obtain one for further evaluation of any possible disc issues.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician assesses low back pain.
A Hemoglobin A1c test was ordered.

evidence.span_text: - Medical Treatment: Hemoglobin A1c ordered as he has not had an updated one in almost 5 months. He will continue with his diet and exercise. Continue current dose of metformin for the time being. The patient will be checking his blood sugar in the morning and will log this information for me.

caps.proposition_text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle was recommended.

evidence.span_text: - Patient Education and Counseling: We discussed the importance of maintaining a healthy lifestyle. I encouraged him to try an avoid foods high in sugar. He asked many questions and I feel he is confident in the plan at this point.

caps.proposition_text: A low back x-ray was ordered.

evidence.span_text: - Medical Reasoning: I believe he has a musculoskeletal low back strain. I do not expect to see anything significant on x-ray, but we will obtain one for further evaluation of any possible disc issues.

caps.proposition_text: The patient will take 400 mg of ibuprofen up to 3 times per day.

evidence.span_text: - Medical Treatment: Low back x-ray ordered. Referral to physical therapy provided. He will take 400 mg of ibuprofen up to 3 times per day. Tylenol can be used for severe pain. Prescription for Flexeril also provided.

caps.proposition_text: The patient can use Tylenol for severe pain.
